comment.body: I had a thought.  Traditionally, CPI is more important than PPI.  But when tariffs start to hit in the numbers, It's producers paying tariffs for imported materials.  We might see tariff impact first in PPI.  This month?  IDK bc who knows what's real anymore with tariffs.
